mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_record(item_id, type, qty, reservation_id, user_id, remark) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{type}, #{qty}, #{reservationId}, #{userId}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM stock_record WHERE item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT sr.*, si.code AS item_code, si.name AS item_name, si.unit AS unit, u.real_name AS operator_name, lr.reserve_no AS reservation_no FROM stock_record sr LEFT JOIN stock_item si ON si.id = sr.item_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = sr.user_id LEFT JOIN lab_reservation lr ON lr.id = sr.reservation_id
AND si.lab_id IN
#{lid}
ORDER BY sr.id DESC
